text_full: a CareSystems Software Engineers Care Systems South Asia (Pvt) Ltd. is a subsidiary of Care Systems Inc., USA, a fast-growing software company, specializing in Workforce Management, Staff Scheduling, and Time & Attendance solutions for clients across the United States and the Middle East. We are currently seeking skilled and motivated Software Engineers to support the enhancement and maintenance of our existing software products, as well as the development of new features and functionalities. Selected candidates will work closely with a senior engineering team and may be considered for senior responsibilities based on experience and performance. This role offers a competitive salary package, commensurate with skills, experience, and qualifications. Required Qualifications and Skills * Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Software Engineering * Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in developing Java-based applications * Strong analytical and problem-solving al * Experience with J2EE applications, JavaScript, jQuery, and CSS * Familiarity with Agile development methodologies * Excellent written and verbal communication skills * Ability to work independently with minimal supervision * Aproactive attitude and strong sense of ownership Please forward your CVs to jobs@caresystemsinc.com and clearly mention the position applied for in the subject line. Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Important Note: Applicants must meet the minimum experience requirement to be considered. Candidates who do not meet this criterion are kindly requested not to apply. www.caresystemsinc.com

Build reusable code and libraries for future use with best practices. Integrate front-end UI with RESTful APIs and back-end services. Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code in C# and TypeScript. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features. Ensure application security through proper authentication and authorization mechanisms. Participate in code reviews and mentor junior team members. Maintain high standards of software quality within the team. Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field. Front-End Development: > 3+years of hands-on experience with Angular. > Strong proficiency in TypeScript, RxJS, NgRx, and Angular CLI. > Solid experience in HTMLS, CSS3, JavaScript, and responsive design. > Experience integrating Angular front-ends with RESTful APIs. Back-End Development: > Hands-on experience with NET Framework (ASP.NET MVC/Web Forms) and .NET Core. > Strong knowledge of C#, Middleware, and REST API development. > Experience working with Relational Databases (e.g., SQL Server). > Good understanding of web security principles (Authentication, Authorization). Proficient with version control tools such as Git or SVN. Familiarity with Object-Oriented Analysis (OOA), Object-Oriented Design (OOD), SOLID principles, and Design Patterns. Exposure to Blazor is an added advantage. Basic understanding of CI/CD pipelines and Agile development practices. Apply now to career's@orysys.com to embark on an exciting career journey! text_full: WE ARE LOOKING FOR >>>> Job helpers, Software Engineer - Website Projects Team (Remote) Experience Level Location Employment Type Company 04+ Years Sri Lanka (Remote) Full-Time The Job Helpers, USA Overview ‘The Job Helpers is seeking a talented and self-driven Software Engineer to join our Website Projects Team. This role is ideal for an engineer with strong web development expertise who enjoys building scalable digital platforms, enhancing user experience, and contributing to our growing portfolio of website solutions. The ideal candidate will excel in R&D, automation, web optimisation, and SEO-driven development while working in a fully remote environment. We offer an Attractive Sri Lankan Payment Plan and opportunities for long-term career growth within a global operation. Key Responsibilities Website Development & Innovation + Contribute to the research, design, and development of new website functionalities, modules, and platforms that align with business requirements. + Enhance existing web applications through performance optimization, UX improvements, and modern coding practices. * Explore and integrate new technologies, frameworks, and automation tools to elevate the platform’s capabilities Cross-Team Collaboration ‘© Work closely with the Website Projects Team, designers, and content teams to coordinate tasks, ensure smooth ‘communication, and maintain project alignment. © Use automation tools to streamline internal workflows, particularly for email sequences and customer communication processes. Full Project Lifecycle Ownership © Participate in the planning, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance of website projects. © Ensure high-quality deliverables through continuous integration, code reviews, and adherence to development standards. © Maintain detailed documentation for systems, updates, and technical decisions. ‘System Stability, Security & Performance ‘© Monitor website performance, uptime, and scalability across all platforms and services. * Proactively troubleshoot bugs, performance issues, and security vulnerabilities Implement best practices for web security, data protection, and system reliability. Technical SEO & Analytics © Apply technical SEO best practices to enhance site visibility, page performance, indexing, and overall search rankings. © Use tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, and performance dashboards to guide improvement initiatives. ‘* Provide insights and recommendations for website growth strategies based on data trends. Reporting & Communication ‘© Maintain consistent communication with The Job Helpers team. ‘© Submit weekly status updates, detailing progress, tasks, blockers, and resource needs. ‘© Prepare monthly and annual reports outlining performance metrics, technical improvements, KPls, and strategic recommendations. Attractive Sri Lankan Payment Plan Required Qualifications Technical Skills ‘© Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or a related field. ‘© 4+ years of experience in full-stack web development. ‘© Strong proficiency in: © JavaScript, TypeScript, HTMLS, CSS3 © React, Nextjs, Angular, or Vuejs + Experience “working” With CMS platforms (WordPress, Webflow, or custom CMS development). + Solid understanding of databases (MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL). '» Experience with REST APls, integrations, and automation workflows. ‘+ Hands-on experience with Git, CI/CD workflows, and cloud platforms. Professional Skills ‘© Strong problem-solving ability with a proactive and detail- oriented mindset. ‘© Ability to work independently in a remote environment. * Excellent communication and documentation skills. '* Experience collaborating with cross-functional teams in fast- paced environments. Preferred Qualifications * Experience in SEO-friendly development and technical ‘optimization. ‘+ Familiarity with workflow automation tools (Make, Zapier, én, etc). ‘© Background in website analytics, performance tuning, and AJB testing, ‘+ Exposure to UX/UI principles and responsive web design. * Knowledge of security best practices and performance monitoring tools. Software We offer one of the most competitive compensation packages for remote engineers in Sri Lanka, including: ‘+ Monthly salary paid in LKR or USD (based on preference). ‘* Performance-based increments every 6 or 12 months. Eligibility for quarterly performance bonuses based on KPIs. How to Apply Additional project-based incentive payments for completing high-impact deliverables. Opportunity for rapid salary growth based on skills, contribution, and tenure. Long-term career track with promotions to Senior Engineer, Team Lead, or Product Engineer roles. Please email your most updated CV/Resume along with a cover letter and your project portfolio to mardy@thejobhelpers.com You may also contact us via Call or WhatsApp at 071499 9656 Applications submitted without a cover letter will not be considered. Before applying, kindly review all criteria and information provided in this job advertisement. Pay close attention to the listed responsibilities and key requirements of the position. Due to the high volume of applications we receive, all submissions will be reviewed in the order they are received. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the first round of interviews. ‘Thank you for your understanding. Q wort atota,Unted states Job helpers

text_full: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer Company: GANA Prt Ltd Project: Apartment Management System (SaaS MVP) About the Project We are building a cloud-based Apartment Management System (SaaS) focused on billing, communication, and complaint handling for apartments in Sri Lanka This is a greenfield product, MVP scope is clearly defined and frozen, and the goal is to launch a revenue-generating system. Role Overview We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer to lead the development of the MVP. ‘You will work closely with the product owner and have high ownership over architecture, development, and delivery. MVP Scope (You will build) Multi-tenant SaaS Units & Residents management Monthly maintenance invoicing ‘Manual one-time invoices PDF invoice generation Notices (push + email) Complaints (with images & status tracking) Admin Web App (React) Resident Mobile App Flutter) Tech Stack Frontend + React (Admin Web App) + Flutter (Resident Mobile App) Backend + Nodejs (REST APIs) + JWT authentication + Role-based access control Database + PostgreSQL (shared DB with apartment_id isolation) Other + S3-compatible object storage + Email + Push notifications + CUCD (basic pipeline) Key Responsib Design and implement REST APIs Build React admin panel Build Flutter mobile app Implement authentication & role-based access Handle invoice generation and PDF exports Ensure data isolation for multi-tenant SaaS Deploy and maintain MVP environment Deliver MVP within agreed timeline Required Skills 3+ years experience in software development Strong experience with Node.js Good knowledge of React Experience with Flutter (or strong mobile development background) PostgreSQL / relational database design + REST API design + Authentication & authorization (JWT) + Clean, maintainable code practices Nice to Have + SaaS or multi-tenant system experience + Billing / invoicing system experience Employment Type + Contract (preferred) OR Full-time (negotiable) + Remote (Sri Lanka) Compensation + Competitive, based on experience + Open to milestone-based payment for contract engagement How to Apply Please apply via email with the following Your CV GitHub / portfolio (if available) A brief note on your experience with similar systems Send your application to: ©! mnaru91@gmail.com ©% Aran Arunakiri@gmail.com

text_full: Quest Are You Ready to Code Your Future? Gampaha | Software Solutions Industry JOB SUMMARY Our client is seeking an enthusiastic Associate Software Engineer with expertise in PHP/Laravel Full Stack development. The role involves designing, developing, and maintaining web applications while collaborating with the development team to deliver high-quality software solutions for clients. RESPONSIBILITIES ¢ Develop and maintain web applications using PHP/Laravel frameworks for full-stack development. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code following best practices. Collaborate with cross-functional teams including UI/UX designers, QA, and product managers to deliver robust solutions. Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize existing software applications for performance and scalability. Participate in code reviews, testing, and knowledge-sharing sessions to continuously improve development practices. Stay updated with emerging technologies and frameworks to implement innovative solutions. © jobs@smartquestconsult.com REQUIREMENTS ¢ Bachelors Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field. 1-2 years of experience in PHP/Laravel full- stack development (fresh graduates with strong projects or internships are welcome). Solid understanding of PHP, Laravel, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and REST APIs. Familiarity with version control systems such as Git. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills. Good communication and teamwork abilities. Proactive, eager to learn, and adaptable to new technologies. O www.smartquestconsult.com (GS) Scan & Apply via OR code to get your profile shortlisted fast!

text_full: ) Insight Software Solutions (ISS) Pty Ltd About ISS Insight Software Solutions (ISS) is a fast-growing technology company delivering Al- powered products and custom software solutions for clients worldwide. With exciting new projects in the pipeline, we're looking for passionate Al Engineers and a Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team. Al Engineer (TypeScript | C# | Python) - Remote (P/T or F/T) We are looking for a hands-on Al Engineer with real project experience in building and delivering Al solutions. Key Responsibilities * Design, build, and deploy Al-driven solutions and products = Develop and manage Al Agents and multi-agent systems * Build Al workflows and orchestration pipelines = Integrate LLMs into production systems + Implement RAG solutions = Work across backend, Al services, and cloud platforms Required Skills & Experience Strong programming experience in G# | TypeScript | Python Practical experience with: = Al Agents & Al Workflows = Azure Al Agent Framework, Azure Al Foundry = LLMs, Hugging face, RAG, Al tools Experience with one or more: = Azure Al = Google Al = AWS Al services Nice to Have + Startup or product-based experience + Knowledge of Al scalability, security, and performance + Experience with cloud-native architectures « Digital Marketing Specialist (Proven Results Required) We are looking for an experienced Digital Marketer with a strong success profile, capable of driving leads, users, and revenue. Key Responsibilities + Plan and execute Linkedin B2B & B2C campaigns + Manage global social media campaigns: © Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X © Other relevant platforms Run campaigns for: + Insight Software Al & Custom Software Consulting + Various Product launches + Execute product marketing and growth campaigns + Manage CRM, lead nurturing, and follow-ups + Email campaigns + Own day-to-day digital marketing operations + Track performance, conversions, and RO! Must Have + Proven success stories / case studies + Strong understanding of funnels, conversions, and growth + Ability to work independently and deliver results Why Iss + Competitive salary + project-based bonuses + Flexible hours & fully remote work from anywhere with a good connection. + Employee Share Program for high performers + Start Part-time with the option to move to full-time. + Annual learning budget and conference events. How to apply 1. Email priyal@insightsoftwaresolutions.com.au with subject “Al Engineer” or “Digital Marketing Specialist”. For confidential enquiries: +94 071 511 1484 The Al gold rush is underway, claim your stake today and let’s build your legacy together.

text_full: Join Our Team Allion Technologies Sri Lanka delivers innovative, scalable software solutions for businesses around the world - combining global expertise, agile development, and a ALLION client-first approach to drive digital transformation and long-term growth across industries. Senior Software Engineer/Associate Tech Lead Hybrid | Colombo 05 We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer / Associate Tech Lead who is highly hands-on and detail-oriented, with strong communication skills. You will play a key role in building modern web and mobile applications, ensuring high UI/UX quality, and contributing to frontend architecture, code quality, and team best practices Responsibilities ¢ Build and lead frontend-heavy applications using React.js and TypeScript * Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile apps using React Native (iOS & Android) * Translate designs and requirements into pixel-perfect, performant Uls * Integrate frontend with backend services built using Nodejs / NestJS ° Implement Al- powered frontend features, including LLM function calling and Al workflows Requirements & Skills * 3+ years of frontend-focused development experience * Strong expertise in Reactjs, React Native, and TypeScript * Solid understanding of frontend architecture, state management, and performance ¢ Working experience integrating APIs built with Node.js / NestJS * Hands-on experience with LLMs, including function calling and Al-driven UI features * Experience integrating with MongoDB, Redis, and REST APIs ¢ Excellent communication skills and strong attention to detail * Strong advantage if you can share frontend applications you have built (live links, repositories, or case studies), especially in React or React Native. Apply now: Let's grow together with Allion Sri Lanka! www.alliontechnologies.com

text_full: sp ateotive ; oftware TogetherWeGrow Build brilliant tech, influencing Here’s your chance to billions of users globally! join the #techindustry as a Senior Software Engineer (React/.NET Core) Sounds Like you? (ENyaNrany Founded in 1999, Creative Software is a global technology enabler and pioneer in Sri Lanka’s tech industry. We manage teams of high-performing, dedicated software engineers for our global clientele, providing them with end-to-end software development and maintenance services through team augmentation. What we expect: * B.Sc. in Engineering, Computer Science, or related discipline * 3+ years of full-stack experience in React and .NET * Front-end requirements: o Strong experience in React, TypeScript, HTML/CSS o Experience with canvas/diagram libraries is a definite advantage 0 Good design instincts and UI/UX awareness * Backend requirements: o Strong experience in .NET Core application development with C# o Exposure in scalable server application architecture o Familiarity with concurrent programming, orchestration frameworks, and design patterns like state machines * Solid understanding of REST API design, development, and integration + Experience with Cl/CD pipelines and MS SQL Server * Experience in Visual Studio, VS Code, Jira, Confluence, GitHub * Strong skills in unit testing, preferably using NUnit * Experience working in an Agile/Scrum development environment * Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal Responsibilities « Design and development of software solutions in collaboration with the client's engineeringteam. * Maintain strong, ongoing relationships with the client’s product managers and engineering team « Ensure high-quality and timely delivery of software solutions « Uphold coding standards, enforce best practices, and ensure continuous improvement. What we offer Our careers offer a flexible working environment, attractive remuneration, and a place to grow and flourish. You will be amongst peers at the top of their game, allowing you to sharpen your skills in an inclusive culture. We offer a variety of spaces that support their work-life balance and integrate wellness into our workplace experience, which includes a recreation zone and gym. If you are a team player with a positive attitude, committed to meeting delivery deadlines in a globally distributed research & development environment, visit us at www.creativesoftware.com/careers and fill in the application under the vacancy “Senior Software Engineer (React/.NET Core) — REF7802” to apply today!

text_full: Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 48 th year of operations. DMS represents the world’s leading IT brands and specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets. DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, financial solutions and learning from the most experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents Diebold Nixdorf Inc. USA, the world leader in CRMs (Cash Recycling Machines) and ATMs (Automated Teller Machines) and while having implemented the following pioneering Projects, DMS is the market leader supporting an installed base of over 2000 CRMs and ATMs in Sri Lanka and the Maldives. Introduced ATMs to the Maldives in 1999 First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific. First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific. First Envelope-less Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific. First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins. Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Kuliyapitiya to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Kuliyapitiya should apply. Engineering Service Executives for Kuliyapitiya (Male) Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training. Candidates should: - Be under 27 years of age. Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution. Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software. Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Kuliyapitiya area. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply. Candidates should reside in the Kuliyapitiya Town or in close proximity to the Kuliyapitiya Town and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL • The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com . Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail. * First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives © First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific. © First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific. © First Envelope-tess Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific. © First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins. Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Kuliyapitiya to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Kuliyapitiya should apply. Engineering Service Executives for Kuliyapitiya (Male) Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training. Candidates should: - 1. Be under 27 years of age. 2. Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution. 3. Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software. Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Kuliyapitiya area. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply. Candidates should reside in the Kuliyapitiya Town or in close proximity to the Kuliyapitiya Town and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. ‘Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL + The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers(@dmslanka?.com, Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail.

text_full: Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd (DMS) Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49th year of business operations, partnering the world's leading IT Co’s. DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets DMS provides the excitement of working with the world's leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents the World's leading American IT Co's IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust-Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years. The following vacancies currently exist in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS. Vacancy: Electronics Engineer s Applicants should be under 28 years of age and have a degree or a Higher National Diploma in Electronics Engineering. Selected candidates will have to test, troubleshoot, and carry out repairs for defective Electronic and other devices and identify long-term rectifications for frequent defects. Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a defined career growth path to Management. Candidates living in the Greater Colombo area are preferred. Benefits: Attractive remuneration package based on qualifications and experience. Medical insurance upon confirmation. How to Apply: Email your CV along with the names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com . Please specify the position you are applying for in the subject line of the email. text_full: Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49th year of business operations, partnering the world's leading IT Co’s. DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets DMS provides the excitement of working with the world's leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents the World's leading American IT Co's IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust-Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Rathnapura and Balangoda areas to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Rathnapura and Balangoda areas should apply. Engineering Service Executives for Rathnapura and Balangoda areas (Male) Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training. Candidates should: - Be under 27 years of age. Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution. Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software. Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Rathnapura and Balangoda areas. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply. Candidates should reside in the Rathnapura or Balangoda Town or in close proximity and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL • The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com . Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail. Candidates should reside in the Rathnapura or Balangoda Town or in close proximity and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL + The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com. Minimum 1 year experience in a call center or customer service role (preferred). Strong verbal communication skills in Tamil and English is required Excellent listening and problem-solving abilities. Basic computer skills and familiarity with CRM systems. Key Responsibilities Handle incoming customer calls related to Master Stroke offers, promotions, and services. Make outbound calls to inform customers about new campaigns, offers, and benefits. Provide clear, accurate information and resolve customer inquiries efficiently. Record and maintain detailed customer interactions in the CRM system. Meet daily/weekly call targets while ensuring excellent service quality. Collaborate with the marketing and sales teams to support campaign goals. ™% operations@quesslanka.com Apply Now! & 404.75 733 4708

text_full: JOIN OUR TEAM A reputed conglomerate with over 75 years of industry leadership in Sri Lanka with a presence ‘ across five key sectors including Maritime & Logistics, Petroleum & Energy, Manufacturing & Distribution, Property & Strategic Investments, and Leisure. McLarens stands as a beacon of excellence representing esteemed global brands (including Fortune 500) in Sri Lanka. You will be a part of a \ team of over a thousand dedicated professionals \) driving our success. At McLarens, we prioritize growth, continually investing in our people and foster a vibrant culture of innovation and collaboration. Associate Software Engineer We are looking for an Associate Software Engineer to join our growing IT team. In this role, you will contribute to the development, maintenance, and optimization of internal software systems, ensuring they’re reliable, secure, and seamlessly integrated with existing platforms. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, maintain, and improve software solutions to support internal departments. Ensure proper use of version control systems and maintain accurate technical documentation and change logs. Follow secure coding practices and ensure all systems adhere to IT security standards. Assist in integrating new solutions with existing platforms such as ERP, CMS, and web portals. Manage and respond to internal IT helpdesk tickets, providing timely and effective technical support. Skills and Experience Required Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Basic understanding of enterprise software applications and business workflows. Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills. Proficiency in programming languages such as PHP and JavaScript. Basic knowledge of databases and SQL. Ability to write clean, efficient, and well-documented code. Willingness to learn new technologies and tools in a fast-paced environment. Understanding of basic software testing principles. Ability to follow established coding standards and best practices. The successful candidate would be provided with a competitive remuneration package on par with industry standards and other fringe benefits Click on the advertisement to apply Director | Human Resources. McLarens Holdings Ltd. 284, Vauxhall Street,Colombo 2. T : +9411 479 9100 E: careers@mclarens.lk www.mclarens.|k Bic McLARENS GROUP
